title: Listening - Part 1
description: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best.
instructions: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear. There are two questions for each extract.

extracts.context: You hear two friends discussing a new space-themed movie.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: So, did 'Final Frontier' live up to the hype? I thought the cinematography was breathtaking. || Man: [1]I found the plot to be a bit predictable, to be honest[/1]. You could see the 'twist' coming from the first ten minutes. || Woman: I see what you mean. It followed the usual sci-fi tropes. || Man: [2]What I really liked, though, was the accurate representation of zero-gravity physics[/2]. It was much more realistic than the usual blockbuster stuff. || Woman: I agree. It made the action scenes much more tense and believable. || Man: Exactly. It’s just a shame the dialogue was so cliché-ridden at times.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So, did 'Final Frontier' live up to the hype? I thought the cinematography was breathtaking.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I found the plot to be a bit predictable, to be honest. You could see the 'twist' coming from the first ten minutes.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I see what you mean. It followed the usual sci-fi tropes.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What I really liked, though, was the accurate representation of zero-gravity physics. It was much more realistic than the usual blockbuster stuff.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I agree. It made the action scenes much more tense and believable.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly. It’s just a shame the dialogue was so cliché-ridden at times.

questions.question: What is the man's main criticism of the film?

options.B: the lack of originality in the story
options.C: the poor quality of the visual effects

questions.explanation: He found the plot 'predictable' and the twist obvious [1].

questions.question: Both speakers admired the film's
questions.explanation: They both praise the 'accurate representation of zero-gravity physics' [2].

extracts.context: You hear two colleagues talking about a change in their company's flexible working policy.
extracts.audio_script: Man: So, we have to be in the office at least four days a week now. What’s your take? || Woman: [3]I suspect the board is worried about 'culture' when they’re actually just trying to justify the rent on this building[/3]. || Man: It does feel a bit forced. I’m much more productive at home without the interruptions. || Woman: [4]I’ve noticed that people are already starting to look for jobs at firms with better remote-work options[/4]. We’re going to lose some good talent. || Man: I agree. It’s a very backward-looking move for a modern company. || Woman: Exactly. It’s a shame they don't trust us to manage our own schedules after two years of doing it successfully.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: So, we have to be in the office at least four days a week now. What’s your take?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I suspect the board is worried about 'culture' when they’re actually just trying to justify the rent on this building.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: It does feel a bit forced. I’m much more productive at home without the interruptions.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I’ve noticed that people are already starting to look for jobs at firms with better remote-work options. We’re going to lose some good talent.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I agree. It’s a very backward-looking move for a modern company.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Exactly. It’s a shame they don't trust us to manage our own schedules after two years of doing it successfully.

questions.question: The woman believes the new policy was motivated by

options.A: a desire to improve team collaboration.
options.B: financial considerations regarding the office space.
options.C: pressure from the company's major clients.

questions.explanation: She thinks they are trying to 'justify the rent on this building' [3].

questions.question: What negative impact of the policy has the woman observed?

options.A: a decrease in the quality of work produced
options.B: a rise in the number of staff resignations
options.C: an increase in conflict between departments

questions.explanation: She notes people are 'looking for jobs at firms with better remote-work options' [4].

extracts.context: You hear two people discussing a new brand of smart-home light bulbs.
extracts.audio_script: Man: I’ve just installed those 'Hue-Plus' bulbs. It’s great being able to change the mood with a voice command. || Woman: [5]I found the initial setup to be incredibly frustrating[/5]. The app kept losing connection with the bridge for no reason. || Man: I had the same issue! I nearly gave up and sent them back. || Woman: [6]I did think the range of colours was exceptionally good, though[/6]. The 'sunset' preset is actually quite relaxing. || Man: I agree. It’s a lot better than the harsh white light from my old bulbs. || Woman: It’s a nice luxury. I just wish the tech was a bit more reliable for the price they charge.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I’ve just installed those 'Hue-Plus' bulbs. It’s great being able to change the mood with a voice command.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I found the initial setup to be incredibly frustrating. The app kept losing connection with the bridge for no reason.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I had the same issue! I nearly gave up and sent them back.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I did think the range of colours was exceptionally good, though. The 'sunset' preset is actually quite relaxing.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I agree. It’s a lot better than the harsh white light from my old bulbs.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It’s a nice luxury. I just wish the tech was a bit more reliable for the price they charge.

questions.question: What was the woman's main issue with the light bulbs?

options.A: the high cost of the electricity used
options.B: the difficulty of the installation process
options.C: the limited variety of brightness settings

questions.explanation: She found the 'initial setup to be incredibly frustrating' due to connection issues [5].

questions.question: Both speakers were impressed by the bulbs'
questions.explanation: They both praise the 'range of colours' and the relaxing 'presets' [6].
